title: rubus × loganobaccus
intro: Rubus × loganobaccus, also known as the loganberry, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between a blackberry (Rubus fruticosus) and a raspberry (Rubus idaeus). The loganberry has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of loganberry include its potential to improve heart health, reduce blood pressure, and support the immune system. Loganberry is often prepared as a tea, jam, or syrup, and is also used in herbal medicine to create capsules or tinctures, offering a natural and versatile way to harness its medicinal properties.
